Generate invite codes so analysts or viewers can self-register and join your organization.

Configure a webhook URL to receive real-time deforestation alerts when high or medium risk is detected.

Alert Officers

Officers registered here receive email (and optionally SMS) alerts automatically when ForestGuard detects a HIGH or MEDIUM risk deforestation event during any scan.
